metric: machine-type retrieval accuracy (>=3 of top-5 cards carry a tag from the clip's machine family)
protocol: MIMII test clips, sample 50/machine seed 42; CLAP audio embedding -> audio_card_vectors top-5 (cosine)
note: MIMII lacks fault-family labels; machine-type retrieval is the measurable proxy (spec metric adaptation). Fault-family retrieval quality is qualitative (demo evidence).
